text: There is a clarity and focus to this space, almost clinical yet bursting with latent ideas. The glass walls symbolize both transparency and separation, inviting but also containing. As I move toward the vibrant, colorful R+D display, the atmosphere brims with possibility. I feel intellectually curious, restless in the anticipation of new discoveries, yet also aware of how innovation is always balanced between exposure and enclosure. I am present, expectant, and eager to understand more about how human thought and technology interact in this environment.
